subject: docs: correct Mapbox token restriction docs after research
body:
USER_ACTIONS had wrong instructions: said to edit the default token
(can't be restricted), used wildcard syntax (not supported), and
omitted Referer-based fragility. Updated with accurate steps, known
limitations (Brave Shields/Ghostery break it), and cross-reference
to Vercel proxy alternative in TODO.

TODO updated to say Vercel serverless function instead of Supabase
Edge Function, with decision-pending note on proxy vs URL restrictions.

Tags: documentation, security, mapbox
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NznLYRXfKT1d4frhKMrwtU
title: correct Mapbox token restriction docs after research
